nameMeanings.name: Basset
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French: from a diminutive of Old French bas(se) ‘short, of low stature’ (see Bas ).
English: variant of   Bassett  , a cognate of 1 above.
In some cases also an altered form of French Besset (see Bessette 2). Compare Bassette 1.

variants.name: Bas
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Mauricio, Abelardo, Florencio, Francisco, Jorge, Luis, Manuel, Pedro, Soledad, Vicente.  Eastern Slavic Dmytro, Liya, Pyotr, Sergey.
Catalan: habitational name from a place so named in the district of La Garrotxa, Catalonia.
Basque: topographic name for someone who lived by a wood, from baso ‘wood, forest’.

nameMeanings.name: Thurston
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: from the Anglo-Norman, Anglo-Scandinavian, and Middle English personal name Thurstan, Thorsten (Old Norse Thórsteinn, Thorsten, Anglicized as Old English Thurstān; see Thorstensen ).
habitational name from Thurston in Suffolk, so called from the genitive case of the Old Norse personal name Thóri (see Thor ) + Old English tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’.

variants.name: Tustin
meanings: Transferred use of the surname, which is of uncertain origin, probably a Norman form of the Old Norse personal name Þórsteinn, composed of elements meaning ‘Thor's stone’. It is now used fairly regularly as a given name, largely as a result of the fame of the film actor Dustin Hoffman ( b. 1937 ), who is said to have been named in honour of the less well-known silent film actor Dustin Farman ( 1870–1929 ).

variants.name: Thorstensen
meanings: Norwegian and Danish: patronymic from the personal name Thorsten, a variant of Thorstein, Old Norse Thórsteinn, composed of the name of the god Thórr (see Thor ) + steinn ‘stone, rock’, hence meaning ‘altar of Thor’ or perhaps ‘hammer of Thor’.

en.lifeSummary: When Thurston Basset was born about 1097, in Colston Bassett, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir Ralph Basset Justicar, was 24 and his mother, Alice de Buci, was 24. He had at least 1 daughter. He died in 1175, in Thurleigh, Bedfordshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 79.

ko.Abingdon-on-Thames, Vale of White Horse,: 영국 잉글랜드 스퍼드실르 발 프 휘트 호르스
ko.lifeSummary: Thurston Basset(이)가 대략 1097년 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르 콜스턴 배싯에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Ralph Basset Justicar(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice de Buci(은)는 24세였다. 그는 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1175년 영국 잉글랜드 베드퍼드실르 스를리에서 79세의 나이로 사망했다.
